projectDescription: A personal portfolio website for Gibson Muiruri Mwangi, a Software Engineering student specialising in AI, machine learning, cybersecurity, and research-driven software.
keyFeatures: Privacy-focused AI assistant (Shea Core) built with Python, FastAPI, and Vosk
Digital ID Verification System with QR code generation and authentication
IoT DDoS Detection research for cybersecurity in connected environments
Pandemic detection via social media using ML and social analytics
Technical writing covering AI, identity systems, and public health tech
Responsive single-page layout with sidebar navigation and smooth scrolling
